flavorPhrases: Beneath an overturned stone, shaded from the sun -- {container}.
The cairn was built to mark something. Beneath the lowest stone, wrapped in cloth, this.
A scraped furrow in the sand, half-filled by the wind. Whatever buried this wasn't expecting to leave it long.
Behind a wind-carved pillar of sandstone, in the cool shadow -- {container}.
The dry riverbed has a false bottom here. An old trader's trick.
Tucked under the lip of a rock shelf, just out of the sun. Easy to miss against the stone.
